prompt:
Generate a vertical Instagram Story image for RoozVan, an Iranian community news page for Vancouver, BC.

Scene: modern Vancouver street near the seawall, subtle North Shore mountains in the background, warm natural light, clean editorial Instagram news style, realistic but polished, not cartoonish.

Include this exact Persian/Farsi headline as large readable text, right-to-left, centered in the upper third:
ونکوور؛ خبر مهم برای ایرانیان

Include this exact smaller Persian/Farsi subheading below it:
خلاصه‌ی ساده و قابل فهم در استوری امروز

Design notes: leave safe margins, make the text high contrast, use elegant Persian typography, no English text, no logos, no watermark.
